tagline: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions.
what_it_does: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions. These updates include bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements. For details, see: Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS Databricks Runtime 17.2 Databricks Runtime 17.1 Databricks Runtime 17.0 Databricks Runtime 16.4 LTS Databricks Runtime 15.4 LTS Databricks Runtime 14.3 LTS Databricks Runtime 13.3 LTS Databricks Runtime 12.2 LTS
why_it_matters: These updates include bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements.
plain_summary: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions. These updates include bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements.
key_takeaway: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions.
